# Do not edit manually.

META	2	1
*GROUP	ID	NAME
GROUP	1	Acelab

PARAM	a1f0e7c2-1b3d-4e2a-9c11-0a1b2c3d4e04	Acelab_Last_Synced	TEXT		1	1	Date the mapping was last inherited from the firm library	1	0
